Wade buys three sandwiches and two drinks. The drinks cost $4 each, so the total cost for the drinks is [drink_cost] * 2 = [total_drink_cost]. If Wade spends a total of $26, then the total cost for the sandwiches is [total_spent] - [total_drink_cost] = [total_sandwich_cost]. Since he buys three sandwiches, the cost per sandwich is [total_sandwich_cost] / 3 = [sandwich_price].
